description.description: A brief explanation of the public IPv4 pool.

id.description: The unique identifier for the public IPv4 pool.

network_border_group.description: The group associated with the pool's network border.

pool_address_ranges.description: List of address ranges in the pool with additional details.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the public IPv4 pool for identification.

total_address_count.description: The total number of addresses in the pool.

total_available_address_count.description: The number of addresses currently available in the pool.
